mapper.sql: from t_live_fixed_price_config c left join t_live_time_duration_config d on d.id = c.duration_id and d.is_deleted = 0 left join t_live_user_tier_config t on t.id = c.tier_id and t.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select c.id, c.duration_id, c.tier_id, c.fixed_price, c.status, c.remark, c.create_by, c.update_by, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.is_deleted, d.duration_name as join_duration_name, d.duration_value as join_duration_value, t.tier_name as join_tier_name, t.tier_value as join_tier_value
where c.id = #{id} and c.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
update t_live_fixed_price_config
duration_id = #{durationId},
tier_id = #{tierId},
fixed_price = #{fixedPrice},
status = #{status},
remark = #{remark},
create_by = #{createBy},
update_by = #{updateBy},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
